REQUIRED.id: Campaign id. Dismissal is keyed to this — a NEW id re-shows the offer to everyone, including past dismissers. Convention: name-v1, name-v2.
REQUIRED.enabled: Kill switch. false hides the offer for everyone within the hour.
REQUIRED.percent: Display percentage (1-99). MUST match the real Lemon Squeezy discount or users see a different price at checkout.
REQUIRED.code: The Lemon Squeezy discount code. Pre-applied at checkout + shown in the modal. Must exist and be active in LS before enabling.
REQUIRED.minDaysInstalled: Days since install before the gift appears. 0 = immediately. Reinstalling resets the user's clock. Set to 3 for production.

OPTIONAL.title: Overrides the modal title. Plain string for all users, or per-language: {"en": "...", "es": "..."}. Omit = translated default 'A Gift for You'.
OPTIONAL.subtitle: Overrides the modal subtitle. Same string-or-per-language format.
OPTIONAL.urgency: Extra amber highlight line shown in the modal, e.g. '🔥 Limited launch offer'. Only claim scarcity if a real redemption cap is set in LS.
OPTIONAL.expiresAt: ISO date like 2026-11-30T23:59:59Z. Shows a live countdown in the modal AND auto-hides the whole offer when passed. Match the real LS discount expiry.

OPERATIONS.disable: Set enabled to false (or replace whole file with {}).
OPERATIONS.newCampaign: Change id + code + copy. New id = shows to everyone again.
OPERATIONS.checklist: Before a real launch: 1) LS discount created with duration=once + expiry (+ optional max redemptions), 2) code here matches LS exactly, 3) percent matches LS, 4) minDaysInstalled back to 3.
